full_text:
Sun Zhen 孫震
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Zhen (孫震)was born in Wu. Served Wu during Jin’s invasion. Was captured by Jin forces and executed. Sun Zhen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Zhen lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
